instructions: Check whether the semantic-scholar MCP server is configured before invoking the Python script.
Use the correct subcommand — search for keyword discovery, paper for known IDs/DOIs, author for profiles (by ID), citations for citation graphs.
Never pass a paper title to the paper subcommand or an author name to the author subcommand — IDs are required.
Respect rate limits; never loop subcommands without delay; optionally set SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY for higher quota.
Present results as candidates and require explicit user confirmation before passing any paper to triage-paper.
